channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ABCAPITAL] Aditya Birla Capital Invests Rs. 749 Crore in Wholly Owned Subsidiary Aditya Birla Housing Finance
item.description:
Aditya Birla Capital Limited (ABCL) has invested Rs. 749,99,99,858/- (Rupees Seven Hundred Forty-Nine Crore Ninety-Nine Lakh Ninety-Nine Thousand Eight Hundred and Fifty-Eight Only) on a rights basis in the equity shares of Aditya Birla Housing Finance Limited (ABHFL). ABHFL is a wholly owned subsidiary of ABCL and the investment is aimed at funding its growth and improving its leverage ratio. There is no change in the percentage shareholding of ABCL post the investment.

  • Aditya Birla Capital invested Rs. 749 crore in Aditya Birla Housing Finance Limited.
  • The investment is made on a rights basis.
  • Aditya Birla Housing Finance Limited is a wholly owned subsidiary of Aditya Birla Capital Limited.
  • The investment aims to fund the growth and improve the leverage ratio of Aditya Birla Housing Finance.
  • There is no change in the percentage shareholding of Aditya Birla Capital post the investment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aditya Birla Capital Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [PRIVISCL] Privi Speciality Chemicals Acquires 5.80% Stake in Solar Power Project for Rs. 1,77,57,831
item.description:
Privi Speciality Chemicals Ltd has acquired a 5.80% stake in Radiance MH Sunrise Eleven Private Limited, a Solar Power Project company, for a total investment of Rs. 1,77,57,831. The acquisition was made through a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) and the company has subscribed to 47,103 Equity Shares (Face Value Rs.10) at a price of Rs. 377/- each (including premium of Rs. 367 per share). This investment will help the company generate power through environment friendly resources and reduce its dependence on coal & natural gas, leading to a reduction in electricity cost.

  • Privi Speciality Chemicals has invested Rs. 1,77,57,831 in Radiance MH Sunrise Eleven Private Limited
  • The investment is for a 5.80% stake in the company
  • The investment is made through a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV)
  • The investment will help the company generate power through environment friendly resources and reduce its dependence on coal & natural gas
  • The investment is expected to lead to a reduction in electricity cost

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Privi Speciality Chemicals Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [INDIGO] InterGlobe Aviation CEO Pieter Elbers Resigns Effective Immediately
item.description:
🔥 Trending

InterGlobe Aviation Limited has announced the resignation of its Chief Executive Officer, Pieter Elbers, with immediate effect due to personal reasons. Mr. Elbers has been the CEO since September 2022. The Managing Director, Rahul Bhatia, will assume the management of the Company's affairs in the interim. The Company thanked Mr. Elbers for his contribution and service.

  • Pieter Elbers resigns as CEO of InterGlobe Aviation (IndiGo) with immediate effect due to personal reasons.
  • Rahul Bhatia, Managing Director, will assume management of the Company's affairs in the interim.
  • The Company thanked Mr. Elbers for his contribution and service.
  • InterGlobe Aviation is one of India's fastest growing carriers, operating over 2200 daily flights.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: InterGlobe Aviation Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BARBEQUE] United Foodbrands Ltd Executes Loan Agreement with Subsidiary Red Apple Kitchen Consultancy
item.description:
United Foodbrands Ltd has entered into a loan agreement with its subsidiary, Red Apple Kitchen Consultancy Private Limited. The unsecured loan is granted for meeting Red Apple's capital expenditure and business expansion. The loan amount is INR 10 Crores with a tenor of 4 years and an interest rate of Company's interest rate + 0.5%. Red Apple is a subsidiary of the Company and the transaction is done at arm's length.

  • United Foodbrands Ltd has executed a loan agreement with its subsidiary, Red Apple Kitchen Consultancy Private Limited.
  • The loan is unsecured and granted for meeting Red Apple's capital expenditure and business expansion.
  • The loan amount is INR 10 Crores with a tenor of 4 years and an interest rate of Company's interest rate + 0.5%.
  • Red Apple is a subsidiary of the Company and the transaction is done at arm's length.
  • The loan proceeds will be used for Red Apple's principal business activities only.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Barbeque-Nation Hospitality Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [RADIANTCMS] Radiant Cash Management Services Ltd Issues Corporate Guarantee of INR 120 Million for Subsidiary
item.description:
Radiant Cash Management Services Ltd, a former Radiant Cash Management Service Pvt. Ltd., has issued a corporate guarantee of INR 120 Million (Rupees One Hundred and Twenty Million only) for its subsidiary, Aceware Fintech Services Private Limited. The guarantee is to secure credit facilities availed from The Federal Bank Limited. The guarantee is issued at an arm's length basis, in compliance with the applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, the SEBI Listing Regulations and other applicable laws. The guarantee will be disclosed as a contingent liability in the books of the Standalone Financial Statements of the Company and the actual borrowings of Aceware Fintech Services Pvt. Ltd from The Federal Bank Ltd, as on the reporting date, would be recorded as a borrowing in the consolidated financial statements of the listed entity.

  • Radiant Cash Management Services Ltd issues corporate guarantee for subsidiary
  • Guarantee amount is INR 120 Million
  • Guarantee secures credit facilities from The Federal Bank Limited
  • Guarantee issued at arm's length basis
  • Guarantee to be disclosed as contingent liability in Standalone Financial Statements

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Radiant Cash Management Services Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [MASTERTR] Master Trust Ltd Reports Revised Disclosure under SEBI Regulations for Harjeet Singh Arora Takeovers
item.description:
The Exchange has received a revised Disclosure under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Master Trust Ltd. The disclosure pertains to the encumbrance of 20,00,000 equity shares by way of creation of pledge on behalf of ICICI Bank Limited as collateral for availing of loan by the wholly owned subsidiary of Master Trust Limited, Master Capital Services Limited. The disclosure was made by Mr. Harjeet Singh Arora and Mr. Rajinder Kumar Singhania.

  • Master Trust Ltd has reported a revised Disclosure under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The disclosure is related to the encumbrance of 20,00,000 equity shares of Master Trust Limited.
  • The shares have been pledged to ICICI Bank Limited as collateral for availing of loan by the wholly owned subsidiary of Master Trust Limited, Master Capital Services Limited.
  • The disclosure was made by Mr. Harjeet Singh Arora and Mr. Rajinder Kumar Singhania.
  • The event occurred on 16th February 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MASTER TRUST LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [MASTERTR] Rajinder Kumar Singhania Creates Pledge on Shares of Master Trust Ltd for Loan Availing by Subsidiary
item.description:
Master Trust Ltd has received a revised disclosure under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Rajinder Kumar Singhania, on behalf of ICICI Bank Limited, has created a pledge on 20,00,000 equity shares of Master Trust Limited as collateral for a loan availed by the wholly owned subsidiary, Master Capital Services Limited. This disclosure is required under Regulation 31(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Rajinder Kumar Singhania has created a pledge on 20,00,000 equity shares of Master Trust Limited.
  • The pledge is in favor of ICICI Bank Limited.
  • The shares have been pledged as collateral for a loan availed by the subsidiary, Master Capital Services Limited.
  • This disclosure is made under Regulation 31(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The shares represent 2.44% of the total share capital of Master Trust Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MASTER TRUST LTD. | Category: Loan

item.title: [UNIMOVR] Manbro Industries Ltd Announces Sub-division of Equity Shares
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Manbro Industries Ltd has announced the sub-division of 1 (one) equity share of face value of X 10/- each fully paid-up into 10 (ten) equity shares of face value of Re. 1 each fully paid-up. The record date for determining the members eligible for the sub-division has been fixed as Wednesday, March 25, 2026.

  • Manbro Industries Ltd to sub-divide equity shares
  • 1 equity share of face value X 10/- each to be sub-divided into 10 equity shares of face value Re. 1 each
  • Record date for determining eligible members set to March 25, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNIMODE OVERSEAS LTD. | Category: Split

item.title: [BANKBARODA] Bank of Baroda Revises Marginal Cost of Funds Based Lending Rate (MCLR) Effective March 12, 2026
item.description:
Bank of Baroda has announced a revision in its Marginal Cost of Funds Based Lending Rate (MCLR) effective March 12, 2026. The new MCLR rates for various tenors are as follows: For a tenor of 7 days, the MCLR will be 7.80%. This change is in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 and is required to be uploaded on the website.

  • Bank of Baroda has revised its Marginal Cost of Funds Based Lending Rate (MCLR)
  • The new MCLR rates are effective from March 12, 2026
  • The new MCLR rate for a 7-day tenor is 7.80%
  • This change is in accordance with SEBI regulations
  • The updated information is required to be uploaded on the bank's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BANK OF BARODA | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [LIMECHM] Lime Chemicals Ltd. to Shift Registered Office and Appoint New Independent Director
item.description:
Lime Chemicals Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on 13th March 2026 to consider several key matters. The agenda includes the shift of the company's registered office from ROC Mumbai II to ROC Mumbai I, both within the state of Maharashtra. Additionally, the board will consider the appointment of Mr. Rahim Narsingdani as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director, subject to member approval in the upcoming General Meeting. The board will also discuss any other matter with the chair's permission and the consent of a majority of directors, including at least one independent director.

  • Shift of registered office from ROC Mumbai II to ROC Mumbai I
  • Consideration of appointment of Mr. Rahim Narsingdani as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LIME CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
